DROP TABLE [OUT].[AMPUSH_FB_CONV_API]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [OUT].[AMPUSH_FB_CONV_API]
( 
	[Lead] [nvarchar](max)  NOT NULL,
	[FirstName] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[LastName] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Email] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[EntryDate] DATETIME NULL,
	[AppointmentSetDate] DATETIME NULL,
	[AppointmentDate] DATETIME NULL,
	[Market] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Product] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[CurrentLeadDisposition] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[ApptSet] INT  NULL,
	[Demo] INT  NULL,
	[Sold] INT  NULL,
	[GrossSales] MONEY  NULL,
	[NetSales] MONEY  NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](max)   NULL,
	[JobStatus] [nvarchar](max)   NULL,
	[OperatingCompany] [nvarchar](max)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] DATETIME NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	HEAP
)
GO
